description_for_human: Premium automotive protection studio in Miami, FL — XPEL PPF, ceramic coating, window tint, color change wraps, and marine services.
description_for_model: Bespoke Auto Design is a premium automotive protection studio in Miami, Florida. Services include XPEL paint protection film (PPF) installation (Ultimate Plus, Stealth, Color PPF), ceramic coating (starting at $599), ceramic window tint (starting at $150), color change vinyl wraps, and marine protection (PPF, ceramic coating, tint for boats and yachts). Authorized XPEL dealer. Located at 7943 NW 64th St, Miami, FL 33166. Phone: (786) 395-9172. Serves Miami, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Brickell, Doral, Fort Lauderdale, and surrounding South Florida areas.
